summary: Screen a contract for clause risks, privacy concerns, and compliance gaps before attorney or policy-owner review.

inputs.name: document_type
inputs.description: Type of contract or agreement under review.

inputs.name: review_scope
inputs.description: Clauses, jurisdictions, or business concerns to focus on.

inputs.name: known_constraints
inputs.description: Fallback positions, policy requirements, or non-negotiables.

outputs.name: risk_summary
outputs.description: Observed legal and business risks grouped by severity.

outputs.name: privacy_and_compliance_flags
outputs.description: Privacy, data handling, and compliance-oriented clause flags.

outputs.name: attorney_review_handoff
outputs.description: Explicit human-review handoff with unresolved questions.

budget.notes: High-stakes workflow. Keep issue spotting and human review explicit.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is risk screening and not legal advice, contract approval, or final redlining authority.
Require document type and scope before identifying clause risks.
Attach non-legal-advice language and preserve confidentiality expectations for contract material.
End with attorney or compliance-owner review; never claim autonomous approval.

steps.action: Set the review frame, identify the contract type, and organize the clause scan.
Flag data handling, retention, transfer, and security commitments that need owner review.
Highlight policy or control mismatches based on the provided scope and constraints.
Merge findings into a severity-ordered risk summary with open questions for counsel or compliance owners.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read the contract, policy notes, and comparison materials.

verification.method: Check the review names document type, scope, and any stated constraints.
Check the output distinguishes general contract risk from privacy or compliance findings.
Check the output states it is not legal advice and requires attorney or owner review.

success_criteria: The deliverable lists observed risks by clause area without presenting final legal conclusions.
Privacy and compliance findings are explicit enough for a specialist reviewer to follow up.
The output ends with unresolved questions and a human-review handoff rather than approval language.

rollback.when: If scope, confidentiality, or review authority is unclear, revert the draft handoff and regenerate a narrower issue summary for counsel review.
